inspirations.religion: Mostly set up like the Greek pantheon but with a few twists. The gods are more active and present in the world, but they don't necessarily intervene directly in mortal affairs. They have specific domains and philosophies that influence their followers, but they more often than not don't demand worship or obedience. Names are heavily influenced by Gaulic and Saxon names.
inspirations.cities: Each major city should have a relatively distinct climate and culture inspired by a mix of real-world cultures but avoid the obvious ones. They need defined demographics, governments, economies, and something that sets them apart.
inspirations.continents: The group knows of five continents now but the only two with any information are Aethermoor (which is the name of the world as well, other continents won't refer to this continent in the same manner) and Yetgrese. Current plan is for Aethermoor to be a sort of standard fantasy realm continent that fulfills traditional tropes and Yetgrese is going to be purely unusual -- not a single standard city there.

continents.name: Aethermoor

calendar_system.notes: The 8 day weeks leave 4 days leftover, which is called the Spring Festival halfweek. This is regionally celebrated as a time of renewal and community gathering, with various local traditions. The Spring Festival halfweek is not considered part of any season, but rather a transition period between Winter and Spring.

continents.description: Large continental landmass divided into five regions. note: needs updating.

regions.name: The Western Reach
regions.climate: Temperate maritime overall, distinct microclimates city to city.
regions.shape_note: Wide and shallow — twice as far east-west as north-south.

regions.name: The Northern Reaches
regions.notes: Begins immediately north of Cindermarch. No merchant-council structure. Cindermarch exists specifically because of active conflict with whatever comes from here. Raiding culture implied.

regions.name: The Eastern Interior
regions.climate: Drier, more extreme temperature swings between seasons.
regions.notes: City-states rather than merchant-council model. Valdmere's frontier feeling comes partly from proximity to this region.

regions.name: The Southern Reach
regions.notes: Distinct language entirely unrelated to Western Reach tongues. Sovi comes from here. Petra has partial fluency in Sovi's language suggesting some historical contact between regions.

regions.name: The Deep Interior
regions.notes: Heartland connecting all other regions, belonging to none. Largely unmapped. Dwarven presence suggested by Tormund Coalbeard's background. No roads established, no cities known.

continents.name: Yetgrese
continents.description: Second continent. 2-3 weeks sailing from Aethermoor's western coast; under 2 weeks with magical propulsion if crossing goes smoothly.
continents.climate: Variable regionally. Interior sea climate likely distinct from exterior coasts due to geological shelter.

geography.shape: Crescent — massive partial crater or caldera, eroded asymmetrically over millennia
geography.western: Massive, mountainous, intact. Tallest and most dramatic terrain. Likely volcanic in origin.
geography.eastern: Partially eroded and broken. Lower elevation. Where the old crater wall wore away.
geography.gap: Open waterway where the eastern wall eroded through — connects outer ocean to interior sea.
geography.interior_sea: Massively deep. Geologically sheltered and isolated for millennia. Likely contains unique fauna. Mostly cliffed borders with no beaches — cliffs grow dramatically taller moving west.
geography.archipelago: Complex island chain in the interior where the eroded eastern face crumbled into the water over millennia. Remnants of the old crater wall.
geography.target_city: On the eastern face of the main continent, slightly north of the waterway gap, facing outward toward the open sea.

demographics.notes: Humans are 15-20% of population at most. Several familiar races present but as less common or divergent subtypes — not standard Western Reach versions. Full demographic composition still being established. Do not default to human NPCs.

continents.notes: Dangerous crossing — weather, distance, and navigation all factors. Difficult enough that most Aethermoor residents have never met anyone from there. Occasional traders make the crossing. Target city is trade-accessible but not frequently visited — arrival is noteworthy but not unprecedented.

cities.name: Valdmere
cities.description: Northwest coast, faces south. Frontier port.

cities.name: Cindermarch
cities.description: Military fortress on the Northern Reaches border.
cities.notes: 1 day north of Millhaven, 3 days northeast of Khemrise, 4-5 days ride from Ravenquay.

cities.name: Millhaven
cities.notes: 2 days northeast of Khemrise, 1 day south of Cindermarch, 4 days north of Ravenquay.

cities.name: Khemrise
cities.description: Major coastal city, vineyards. Pivot point where the coast turns north-south.
cities.notes: 2 days sail north of Trevash, 3 days sail north of Ravenquay.

cities.name: Trevash
cities.notes: 2 days sail south of Khemrise, 1 day sail north of Ravenquay.

cities.name: Ravenquay
cities.description: River delta. Dawn Blades home base.
cities.notes: 1 day sail south of Trevash, 3 days sail south of Khemrise.

cities.name: Argentveil
cities.description: Southern coast after eastward bend. Warmest, most cosmopolitan.

wilderness.name: Crossroads Rest
wilderness.description: Waystation on main road. 2 days north of Ravenquay toward Millhaven.

wilderness.name: Verath Ohn
wilderness.description: Off southern coast, in the water.

name: Northern Reaches
shape_notes: Top point (20,40) — furthest north. Top left coast (20,40) to (0,20). Top right coast (20,40) to (40,20). Bottom left border (0,20) to (8,0). Bottom right border (40,20) to (32,0). Bottom edge (8,0) to (32,0) — Western Reach border.

locations.name: Cindermarch
locations.description: Bottom center on border line. Military fortress, Western Reach side.

locations.name: Northern Rock Waystation
locations.description: Rock overhang shelter. Firstwalker songs carved in hearthstone.

locations.name: Vethara Winter Camp
locations.description: Northeast of Cindermarch. Firstwalker winter camp.

locations.name: Greyspine Passage
locations.description: Narrow mountain passage. Only winter route through the ridge.

locations.name: Observatory
locations.description: Ancient pre-settlement structure. Mast's research base.
